title: Benchmark config
description: Timing-sweep config for scripts/benchmark_measures.py. Mirrors BenchmarkConfig in scripts/pbi_capture/config.py; that module's validate_benchmark remains the authority for cross-field rules JSON Schema can't express (every cross_product_value_filters key must also appear in cross_product_columns).

output_dir.description: Where outputs are written. Default output/benchmark.

connection.description: Leave empty to auto-discover the local msmdsrv instance.

max_rows_per_context.description: TOPN row cap per context. Default 0 (no cap). Benchmark may use a positive cap.

memory_threshold_pct.description: Memory-watchdog trip point, as a % of actual total RAM. Default 80.0. Set 0 to disable.

skip_on_smoke_failure.description: Skip measures that fail the smoke test. Default true.

diagnostic_mode.description: Run only the first 8 tests. Default false.

single_slice_dimensions.description: Label -> DAX column. One query per dimension per measure.

cross_product_columns.description: DAX columns combined into one SUMMARIZECOLUMNS (matrix-visual shape).

cross_product_value_filters.description: Column -> list of values, applied as TREATAS within the cross-product. Every key must also appear in cross_product_columns (enforced by validate_benchmark, not this schema).

global_filters.description: Column -> list of values, applied as TREATAS to every query. NOTE: differs from the capture workflow, where global_filters is an array of DAX boolean strings.
